title: rubus supinus
intro: Rubus supinus, also known as the creeping raspberry or low-lying raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus supinus include its ability to help reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of various digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Rubus supinus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
